texto: The two biggest things that translate from the pitching mound to hunting and fishing are patience and perseverance. When you're on the mound, you have to take the game one pitch at a time, regardless of the score, and that approach helps when I'm in the woods or on the water as well.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jon Lester sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “The two biggest things that translate from the pitching mound to hunting and fishing are patience…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, time, perseverance, útil em momentos de perseverance e water.

frase_original: The two biggest things that translate from the pitching mound to hunting and fishing are patience and perseverance. When you're on the mound, you have to take the game one pitch at a time, regardless of the score, and that approach helps when I'm in the woods or on the water as well.
